title: Drills+
description:
It adds... well... drills! 
work in progress
body:
a short and simple mod that doesnt add much but a drill (more will be added in later versions) 
maybe new loaders soon if im able to figure it out
feel free to use in any modpack or vid, i dont mind :)

currently there is only one drill:
Iron Drill- it works simimlarly to a pickaxe with a few changes

Iron Drill:
High efficiency and damage
but it is quite expensive

Repair:
Repair in a anvil with redstone
